title: Model
description: Represents a model available through the Agent API.

id.description: The model identifier in `provider/model-name` format. Use this value as the `model` parameter in Agent API requests.

object.description: The object type, which is always `model`.

created.description: The Unix timestamp (in seconds) when the model was created.

owned_by.description: The provider that owns the model (e.g. `openai`, `anthropic`, `google`, `perplexity`, `xai`, `nvidia`).
